ec2.ipamscope.IpamId.Description: The ID of the IPAM for which you're creating this scope.

ec2.ipamscope.Tags.Description: The key/value combination of a tag assigned to the resource. Use the tag key in the filter name and the tag value as the filter value. For example, to find all resources that have a tag with the key `Owner` and the value `TeamA`, specify `tag:Owner` for the filter name and `TeamA` for the filter value.
